name: eventhub-notification
description: AI skill for the EventHub notification microservice (Node.js + Bull).
notes: Queue-driven service using Bull (Redis) for async job processing.
Email notifications are simulated (logged to console, no SMTP).
Email types: order_confirmation, event_reminder, payout_notification, vendor_approval.
Webhook delivery to vendors with exponential backoff retry (max 5 attempts).
4xx client errors are NOT retried; 5xx errors and timeouts are retried.
Dead-letter store: failed jobs persisted as JSON files to data/dead-letter/ directory.
Core API publishes jobs to Redis queues; this service consumes them.
Express server exposes GET /health and GET /dead-letter endpoints.
HMAC-SHA256 signatures on webhook payloads using CORE_API_SECRET.
